
✻ Sautéed for 2m 40s

❯ 好的，两个线路都想要实现看看效果，目前先花小代价实现这次的结构分类器，我看看效果，然后你可以单独新建一个issue，跟进
  我们的diff方案

⏺ Bash(which jq python3 2>&1)
  ⎿  /opt/homebrew/bin/jq
     /opt/homebrew/bin/python3

⏺ Bash(herdr agent list 2>&1 | jq -r '.result.agents[] | "\(.terminal_id) \(.agent) \(.agent_status)"' 2>&1)
  ⎿  term_656f1b80196f5fc claude working
     term_65703d313a84f134 pi idle
     term_6571686c50d2318e pi idle
     term_656f6e17a407510a grok idle

⏺ Good, the same agents are still running. Let me capture fresh, byte-exact fixtures for each:

⏺ Bash(mkdir -p /Users/lixuexin/source/personal/herdr-connect/internal/herdrsource/testdata
      herdr agent read term_656f1b80196f5fc --source recent-unwrapped --lines 40 2>&1 | jq -r '.result.read.text' >
      /Users/lixuexin/source/personal/herdr-connect/internal/herdrsource/testdata/pane-claude.txt
      herdr agent read term_65703d313a84f134 --source recent-unwrapped --lines 30 2>&1 | jq -r '.result.read.text' >
      /Users/lixuexin/source/personal/herdr-connect/internal/herdrsource/testdata/pane-pi.txt
      herdr agent read term_656f6e17a407510a --source recent-unwrapped --lines 30 2>&1 | jq -r '.result.read.text' >
      /Users/lixuexin/source/personal/herdr-connect/internal/herdrsource/testdata/pane-grok.txt
      echo "--- claude bytes ---"; wc -c
      /Users/lixuexin/source/personal/herdr-connect/internal/herdrsource/testdata/pane-claude.txt
      echo "--- pi bytes ---"; wc -c
      /Users/lixuexin/source/personal/herdr-connect/internal/herdrsource/testdata/pane-pi.txt
      echo "--- grok bytes ---"; wc -c
      /Users/lixuexin/source/personal/herdr-connect/internal/herdrsource/testdata/pane-grok.txt)
  ⎿  Running…

✳ Synthesizing… (56s · ↓ 3.7k tokens)
